name: xyndrome-remotion-intro
description: Premium Xyndrome app introduction video built with Remotion

scripts.render: remotion render XyndromeIntro out/xyndrome-intro-9x16.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=17 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
scripts.still: remotion still XyndromeIntro out/preview-frame.png --frame=450 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
